title: Etsy Inc (ETSY) Q1 2025 Earnings Call Highlights: Navigating Challenges with Strategic Growth
text: Etsy reported adjusted earnings per share of 46 cents versus 49 cents expected, while revenue of $651.2 million beat expectations of $643 million. However, Etsy shares tumbled after the company posted a mixed first-quarter earnings report, with revenue beating expectations but gross merchandise sales continuing to lag year over year. Consolidated GMS reached $2.8 billion, a 6.5% decrease year-over-year. However, GMS on Etsy's core marketplace reached $2.46 billion, up 5.5% year over year, marking Etsy's second straight quarter of GMS growth. Before the earnings, Etsy was operating in a challenging macroeconomic backdrop marked by persistent pressure on consumer discretionary spending. Etsy's investments in AI, personalization and agentic commerce were expected to strengthen its marketplace, with machine learning and LLMs better matching buyer intent with listings, while early integrations with platforms like ChatGPT, Google and Microsoft generated agentic traffic up 15x year over year. The company took a $101.7 million hit during the quarter as Etsy sold off Reverb, its musical instrument marketplace, and Etsy is moving ahead with its planned $1.2 billion sale of resale platform Depop to eBay Inc., which it expects to close by the end of the third quarter.
